title: Access Wireless - Free Government Phone (Lifeline)
description: Free smartphone with unlimited talk, text, and data through the federally funded Lifeline Assistance program for qualifying low-income individuals.
engage: Apply online at accesswireless.com — enter your zip code to check availability and start enrollment. For help call 1-888-900-5899 Mon–Sat 10am–10pm EST or Sun 10am–7pm EST.
content:
Services

  • Free Smartphone: Government-funded smartphone at no cost to qualifying customers.
  • Unlimited Service: Free unlimited talk, text, data, and hotspot through the Lifeline program.
  • International Calling: International calls available.
  • Prepaid Airtime Cards: Available at 7-Eleven, Family Dollar, Speedway, and Kroger stores.

Eligibility

  • Must qualify for the federal Lifeline Assistance program (income-based or participation in Medicaid, SNAP, SSI, Federal Public Housing Assistance, or Veterans Pension/Survivor Benefits)
  • Only one Lifeline benefit allowed per household
  • Must provide documentation confirming eligibility
  • Availability varies by state

How to Apply

Visit accesswireless.com and enter your zip code to begin enrollment online.

Customer Service Hours

Monday–Saturday: 10am–10pm EST. Sunday: 10am–7pm EST.

New customers: 1-888-900-5899. Existing customers: 1-866-594-3644 or dial 611.
